scripts.build:all: npm run build -w apps/auth-service && npm run build -w apps/property-service && npm run build -w apps/client
scripts.prod:env: cp apps/auth-service/.envprod apps/auth-service/.env && cp apps/property-service/.envprod apps/property-service/.env
scripts.prod: npm run prod:env && npm run build:all && pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.cjs --env production
